name: donut-active
description: Donut chart with one segment highlighted and selectable for emphasis

data.name: data
data.description: Array of data items for the donut slices. Items with selected=true will be initially offset. Example: [{value: 100, name: 'Category 1'}, {value: 200, name: 'Category 2'}]

radius.name: radius
radius.description: Inner and outer radius [innerRadius, outerRadius]. Example: ['40%', '70%']

selectedOffset.name: selectedOffset
selectedOffset.description: Distance to offset selected slices in pixels. Example: 10

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
